title: Rolling in the Deep
why_this_song: Rolling in the Deep by Adele (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Rolling in the deep (tears are gonna fall)"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Rolling in the deep (tears are gonna fall)"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "We could've had it all (you're gonna wish you)"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "We could've had it all (you're gonna wish you)"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "(Never had met me)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You had my heart inside (you're gonna wish you)
Of your hands (never had met me)
And you played it (tears are gonna fall)
There's a fire starting in my heart
Reaching a fever pitch, it's bringing me out the dark
Finally I can see you crystal clear
Go ahead and sell me out and I'll lay your ship bare

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rolling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rolling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "deep" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: There's a fire starting in my heart
They keep me thinking (rolling in the deep)
Turn my sorrow into treasured gold (whoa)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Finally I can see you crystal clear
Of your hands (never had met me)

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Rolling in the Deep" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Rolling in the Deep" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Rolling in the Deep", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Rolling in the Deep", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Rolling in the Deep" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Rolling in the Deep" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
